publishedAbstract: - The storagecluster is configured like this on the network section: ~~~ $ oc get storagecluster ocs-storagecluster-o yaml network: provider: multus selectors: cluster: openshift-storage/odf-storage-nad public: openshift-storage/odf-storage-nad ~~~- Multus validation tool fails:- [Running multus validation tool post ODF deployment](https://access.redhat.com/solutions/7050249)- [Running multus validation tool post ODF deployment- Disconnected environment](https://access.redhat.com/solutions/7071159)- osd pods are flapping
publishedTitle: ODF - Multus networks public and cluster cannot use the same NAD (Network Attachment Definition)
